speaker: MATT
raw_text: Perfect, that's what was missing. Right in my lav. Anyway, welcome. The start of the episode. All day, the energy from the community on the internet has been just overwhelming. The stories, the messages, the art. It's been intense. That's because of you guys, all of you. There are so many people to thank for the fact that we've been doing this as long as we have, and enjoying it as much as we have every step of the way. Thank you to everyone here at Geek & Sundry that brought us in, and had faith in this weird little show. Thank you to my incredible cast that really make the show. I set the table, you all actually make the dinner.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hello everyone, and welcome to tonight's episode of Critical Role, where a bunch of us nerdy-ass voice actors sit around and play Dungeons & Dragons. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For our special 100th episode, which is crazy. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, you may have noticed, we have a new set. Our crew's been kicking ass and working hard to get this done in time for this episode, and we're pretty keen on it. so welcome to the visual upgrade to Critical Role. That includes the glasses, the hats, and the various accoutrements. I should probably put mine up too.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They'll be here forever.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: We all laugh now, until the announcement of the Extended Puppy comic series at Comic Con in a few months.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Spider-Man.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Marvel character.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Flying-man.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Uh, yoga position.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Firefly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Marvel character?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yoga position. Devil Dinosaur.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Devil Dinosaur is definitely a Marvel character.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Invisible Woman.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Marvel character.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wild Thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Both?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yoga pose. Medusa.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Marvel character.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Bird of Paradise.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yoga position.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Cow Face.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Marvel character?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yoga pose! The Hood.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Marvel character.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The Warrior.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yoga position.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Ares.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Marvel character.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Extended puppy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Later. Yoga position.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Correct, yay! Marvel Puzzle Quest, everybody. Get it wherever you get your games, today.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Watch him on the Wednesday Club. Shameless plug.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There will be another shameless plug later.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Also, I'm going to be at A-Kon tomorrow. Fly out in the morning to Texas. So, looking forward to seeing you guys in Dallas.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's just the tip of the iceberg, Matt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That has to be certifiable on some level.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Campaign four, I'm waiting for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Give it time, I'm sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt, that soda pop looks like you're drinking it out of a wine glass.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We are running out of receptacles for soda pop, Sam.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All righty. So, picking up where we left off last time, Vox Machina had just completed their adventure in the distant countryside of Wildmount, interfacing with the Darrington family and apparently their long-acquired debt with the Myriad, a criminal syndicate on that side of the world. After making a deal that would salvage elements of the Darrington family, you made your way back and encountered a half-orc bardbarian by the way of Lionel, who was there on behest of his boss, Aes Adon, or, as you were immediately referred to as, the Meat Man. Immediately. You were brought to a nearby tavern in Whitestone where the vicinity had been rented out entirely and you met with a large, intimidating-looking gentleman. Scarred, pockmarked, ready to go ahead and wheel and deal some business with you. After some interesting conversation and some sly insights by Vex'ahlia and Keyleth, it was discovered that the Meat Man was indeed your old compatriot Scanlan under an illusion, to attempt to notify you that he'd discovered something quite dangerous on his side of Exandria. You discovered that this fantastic bardbarian Lionel had been working for him under his Meat Man guise in Ank'Harel for the better part of a year, and while set on a mission with a number of other compatriots of his, Lionel had stumbled upon an area called the Smouldercrown, a mountain range not terribly far from Ank'harel, what seemed to be a cavern structure that led to an underground pyramid, similar to the ziggurat that you guys had been keeping an eye on underneath Whitestone, which also contained its own small black spherical orb in which they were feeding magical items towards, it looked like. However, they were discovered in that tunnel and Lionel was the only one to escape with his life. The rest fell behind and were left for dead. Upon notifying Scanlan, or the Meat Man, of this information, he knew it was pertinent to return and get this to you in person. After which, apologies were made; some were accepted, some were not. But it was generally decided by the team that, based on this information, you needed to make your way to Ank'Harel post-haste and discover what exactly resides beneath the mountains of the Smouldercrown. You gathered up the following moment, well rested, all met up at the base of the Sun Tree in the center of the square, and that's where we left off. So, as you've gathered your materials, your weapons, your armor, what you think you may need for this trek, you've all gathered around the base of the Sun Tree. Some shade has been thrown, but you have gathered. So, what do you wish to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, no, no, maybe Vax needs glasses to see in the dark.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe he does! Maybe he does. Look at my shoulders! I'm like Travis Willingham! Is this what it feels like, Travis?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I have to put them on under each shirt. It's a real bitch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Man, I've been Crossfitting all day! That's like stitching knitwear, right? Crossfitting all day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ah, you're hitting me with your shoulders.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Cacaw!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Kiki. Thank you. Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're phenomenal!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This will sit in my office and scare my children. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Appreciate it, Medhiv. All right, guys. We ready? Let's dive in now to tonight's episode of Critical Role. [dramatic music]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back, everyone. So. You all right, Jon?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's jacking in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's jacking in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And the lava's connected. Welcome back, Jon! Glad you could join us again. (cheering)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All righty. So, picking up where we left off last time, Vox Machina had just completed their adventure in the distant countryside of Wildmount, interfacing with the Darrington family and apparently their long-acquired debt with the Myriad, a criminal syndicate on that side of the world. After making a deal that would salvage elements of the Darrington family, you made your way back and encountered a half-orc bardbarian by the way of Lionel, who was there on behest of his boss, Aes Adon, or, as you were immediately referred to as, the Meat Man. Immediately. You were brought to a nearby tavern in Whitestone where the vicinity had been rented out entirely and you met with a large, intimidating-looking gentleman. Scarred, pockmarked, ready to go ahead and wheel and deal some business with you. After some interesting conversation and some sly insights by Vex'ahlia and Keyleth, it was discovered that the Meat Man was indeed your old compatriot Scanlan under an illusion, to attempt to notify you that he'd discovered something quite dangerous on his side of Exandria. You discovered that this fantastic bardbarian Lionel had been working for him under his Meat Man guise in Ank'Harel for the better part of a year, and while set on a mission with a number of other compatriots of his, Lionel had stumbled upon an area called the Smouldercrown, a mountain range not terribly far from Ank'harel, what seemed to be a cavern structure that led to an underground pyramid, similar to the ziggurat that you guys had been keeping an eye on underneath Whitestone, which also contained its own small black spherical orb in which they were feeding magical items towards, it looked like. preceding_turns.text: No, no, no, maybe Vax needs glasses to see in the dark.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe he does! Maybe he does. Look at my shoulders! I'm like Travis Willingham! Is this what it feels like, Travis?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I have to put them on under each shirt. It's a real bitch.

preceding_turns.text: Man, I've been Crossfitting all day! That's like stitching knitwear, right? Crossfitting all day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.text: Appreciate it, Medhiv. All right, guys. We ready? Let's dive in now to tonight's episode of Critical Role. [dramatic music]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back, everyone. So. You all right, Jon?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's jacking in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's jacking in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And the lava's connected. Welcome back, Jon! Glad you could join us again. (cheering)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: After an incredibly long, well-stretched six seconds, you all eventually make your way through the doorway into the center of Ank'harel. The temperature difference is stark, it's immediate. Whereas you had a gradual transition to Ank'harel last time you were there, going from the Whitestone colder, more damp climate to the immediate dry heat of the central Marquet desert is just immediate, it's uncomfortable-- it may be comfortable for some of you-- and your mouth immediately dries out for a moment, and you have to adjust to the new atmosphere. Looking around you, you've emerged from the outside of one of the central oases, which is kind of near the Lux Run where you originally entered the city. There, you see the streets are bustling and busy. It's starting to get closer to later in the evening now, on this part of Exandria. You can see the sky's starting to get a little darker. There's an element of dusk that will probably be setting in about an hour. But here you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll do the oasis.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As Keyleth reaches out, Lionel, you watch as the small half-elf red-headed girl reaches out and touches the tree, and suddenly the trunk splits open at the base, and you watch as what seems to be a glowing doorway of divine energy appears.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Go, go! Six seconds, go! Go, go!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I help shove.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I should note that Doty is coming with us as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, quickly!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sure, I'll note that Trinket is coming as well, even though it's a fucking given.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I shove my sister through the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Warming up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, just kidding, I love you Tary.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're not here, I just shoved you through the tree. I made it up, I created it, right there on the fly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We all go through the tree, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you're still a display of people in heavy leather hugging for ten minutes in the middle of this open thoroughfare.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So everyone except for Scanlan gets 17 temporary hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks, Kiki! No, no, no, Percy brought me in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Brought her out of her comfort bubble.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you all slowly begin to realize the slight display you've given in the center of the town, especially those of you in your darker, heavier leathers amongst this very warm, open air.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I thought we knew we were going to Ank'harel so we dressed for it. That's what we said the last episode.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Did you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's what you said, actually. You said "you all showed up dressed for Ank'harel."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: My armor is fire set.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'll trust you on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like you said it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You would've, it's fine. But it's less the attire. You're still wearing your armor, I assume.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, yes, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, you're still in heavy leathers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we're just doing the whole Lawrence of Arabia.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "They have been well. You've only been gone for a few hours, but they've been uneventful."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Was that a fart?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's one of the various beasts of burden that you're walking past in the streets of Ank'harel. (fart sound)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To be fair, sometimes the Slayer's Cakes get a little...

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They're rich.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're working out the ingredients.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Adventurers can't get it right all the time. So you come to this modest tobacco shop. As you lead them into the interior, one of your employees, Doran, who is a rather scrawny-looking boy maybe of 22, 23, completely shaved head, tanned skin, a little sallow, but he's sitting there, balancing a long, thin, almost like a railroad-spike-type metal rod. He's just kind of balancing it over the wood, and as soon as the door opens, he fumbles. "Ah. Aes. It is a pleasure to have you back."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How are things in my absence?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Been here? Ank'harel? I've lost track of time. Better part of maybe eight months, nine months?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shit. Is she buff now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's pretty buff.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You got a haircut! I love it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You know. The hot weather around here is a bit of a bitch this time of the year, so best to get it taken care of. Anyway. What the fuck are you all doing here?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I went to get them to tell them about the thing that we found.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right, okay. Great."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I was going to escort them there. Do you think you have things handled if we go for a day?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, that's fine, I've only been dealing with this for the past two and half weeks without you just fine, no one's noticed, until you came up inside looking the same as me. That's great!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, I didn't know you were throning.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 'Throning'.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, is that a thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, when we're in command, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's not called throning, don't listen to him."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How long have you been here?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So once a day, you can just drink a pint of some alcoholic drink, and it'll heal you like a basic healing potion.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You go first.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, she beat me! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You rip the chain from his grip.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What did I get? What is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's an Amulet of the Drunkard."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What's that mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You wear that, you drink yourself some fine, fine alcohol, might heal you a bit."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you already wear a necklace? I already wear a necklace, so I probably can't wear it, huh? You can get up. It's okay, you can go. You've got 30 feet!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jack off, jack off, jack off!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The umbilical! There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're good, you're good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It turns spirits into potions. That's pretty solid.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Beer, ale, mead, or wine will cause you to regain 2d4 + 2 hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh jeez, that's so cool. Do you already wear a necklace, Grog? Do you have to attune to it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is not attuned. But there is a limit to it, if you read it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can only once until the next dawn.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Can't really talk. You're a cloud. So if you wanted to, you could spend a minute to concentrate and revert back, and you can do that-- you have an eight-hour period where you can just turn back and forth.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It'll take more than a day to get there anyway, so this way we'll just save some time and we'll take a day to take a look around.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Lionel, this is really awesome. For real, you're going to like this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ready? Ready? Everybody join hands, join hands, join hands.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we have to join hands for this?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We don't at all. Not at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Can we still do it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Poof!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you guys feel a warm, magical effect go through you. As you're concentrating, consider yourself being a cloud, you are the cloud. You open your eyes, Lionel, and you look, and you are a fucking cloud! You're like 20 feet up!

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Oh, check this out! (spits)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you do that, you watch as more cloud spit goes (fft) and just more cloud. Your body is moisture. When you try and talk, it just goes (exhale).

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: So you can't really talk.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 14. All right. So you're traveling at an incredible speed. Like you're used to walking speed, running speed sometimes, maybe horsey speed. This is a very, very fast speed. You're coasting through the air right as the sun begins to set, and the night begins to hit. You keep relatively low to the ground, so you have your Darkvision to see the topography and get an idea of where it's going and the direction. You can look up and see the stars above. You've traveled, and you've been amongst this desert most of your life, so you have a good sense of how to follow that, and because of that, you're able to maintain your directional position towards the Smouldercrown Mountains. You push on. About halfway through the journey, you can see some little flames occasionally in the distance, what looks to be either caravan camps or bandit camps or various nomad circles that are set up for the night where different campfires are placed, whether it's beacons, traps, or just people to stay warm for the evening. You know, best not to stop whenever you see a flame in the middle of the desert. The winds are picking up and getting colder, the stark contrast between the temperature of the day and the night here is immense, and your moisture form takes on the cold fairly quickly, and you feel, even though you're in this form, the chill still captures you a bit as your condensation begins to slightly crystallize in places, but you push on. Roll one more survival check, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So you all go into your mist forms and begin to follow after Lionel's lead. As you guys coast over the upper areas of Ank'harel, it's a beautiful view looking down at this gorgeous city, just this glittering jewel of color and architecture, one of the older cities in Exandria that portions of it seem to have survived elements of the Age of Arcanum and the Calamity, and one of the first societies to spring up thereafter. And it's beautiful to see this history, far longer than that of Tal'Dorei, or at least the human societies of Tal'Dorei, just standing obstinate against the dark oppression of the surrounding desert. You continue to head in that direction, with you leading. Lionel, I need you to roll a survival check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Survival check. We might get lost?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Add that to your survival.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 15. And without an issue or any sort of a loss of step or position, eventually you watch as the ominous spire-like jagged dagger-topped Smouldercrown Mountains begin to break the horizon and make their way towards you. You're now, at that speed, it hasn't been that long since you left, maybe a few hours out of Ank'harel. So you're maybe around ten o'clock in the evening or so, 10:30. Going to go ahead and move over here to a non--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't get us lost!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You're still in cloud form. But you see some of the landmarks that seem to triangulate where you originally found the entrance. However, to truly search in this area, you'd have to get low and probably go to your physical form to seek it out. All right, so. You take a minute to concentrate and you revert back into your half-orc form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 21, okay then. You very quickly look around and recall some of the landmarks.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: I'm still in cloud form.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You're able to see in the dark for a decent amount. You walk the perimeter of this space where the first cavern was, and you feel around, and you gather that there was a path here, but it looks like there's been a small cave-in. A lot of the rocks appear like they've been recently fallen in, and there's some sort of a grade to them where you watch loose rocks have recently been tossed around that are of a deeper-set red color and haven't been quite as weathered as the exterior of the mountain appears to be. So apparently the entrance that you originally used either has collapsed on its own, or was intentionally shut.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 21, okay then. You very quickly look around and recall some of the landmarks.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: I'm still in cloud form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're still in cloud form. But you see some of the landmarks that seem to triangulate where you originally found the entrance. However, to truly search in this area, you'd have to get low and probably go to your physical form to seek it out. All right, so. You take a minute to concentrate and you revert back into your half-orc form.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I go down and do it, too, 'cause he did it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Everyone else joining him?

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so the rest of the party goes, and they take their physical form. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: That was awesome, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is this where it is?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you guys are having this moment, and you get low to the ground and begin to read the patterns of the different rocks that have tumbled and left small grooves and a little bit of dust and sand that does reside over this dark, caked dirt and rock, and you do notice a number of footprints. They're scattered a bit, some older, some newer. There's been a lot of foot traffic in and out of this cavern fairly recently, like a week or so ago. And you begin to follow the tracks. Some lead back the path you came, some seem to circle around further into the valley around this mountain.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: We can see if there are if we Commune With Ducks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The cave-in is not natural. The rocks you can see, the portion of the archway where the natural mountain rock becomes the rockslide that seems to have filled the space, there is no damage that seems to be seismic or quaked, and you can see what appear to be some cleft sides at the edge of this entrance where it appears like elements of it were actually hacked or damaged until it eventually fell in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are there any kind of tracks around, or footfalls that look like it was recent?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a-- for you, it would be a survival check, 'cause you're a tracker.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And it's a mountain!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I honestly think they might have trapped it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can roll that one again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll wait until she has looked, and then I'll take a look.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's way better! 27!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. So you fly up. (flapping wings) 60 feet a round. It'll take you a good five minutes or so to make your way towards the top end of the spire. As you're going, make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, wait, wait, before you do that, are you sure that's--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, slow down, you're doing all the shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're going to just shoot something in there? What if they see it fly in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's why I was going to crouch down and shoot the arrow super low to the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What if they still see the arrow fly in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, when I peeked my head in, before I got my life sucked out, I didn't see anything in front of me. Did I?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to assume that before we heard her gasping, Keyleth was filling us in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You know, I think it's right around that direction. Follow the gasping. It feels like it's really close to the gasping.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go check out the top. (mist sound)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Give me shit, and then take off on your own.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm not going to stick my face in something.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 18. You glide around there for a good ten, 15 minutes or so, scouring the edge. All you know is it's near the top, and you see no sign of an entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm wind. I'm not going high, I'm going through the treetops.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so make a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I will. That is very good. That is a 35.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 35, okay. As far as you understand, no one seems to see you. Make an investigation check as you make your way up the mountainside to check for any sort of entrances.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You should mark off one of your Lucks because you already used it for the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I did, it's on the plastic.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Keep him honest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh man. I love you so wholeheartedly, and on a regular basis you kick me in the goolies. I don't understand it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Good old four-Luck O'Brien.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Seven Luck. It's not per game, it's per day, so if we go to bed, it resets. Fart knockers. I'm doing investigation? That's 18.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That would be high enough to just barely focus your half-elven eyes and glance down. You get to see the very faint bead of light at the very tip, and it doesn't seem to change over the next 30 seconds, next minute, next two minutes while you focus intently. You don't see any shift or change.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's maybe move away from the entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I peek my head back in and do a...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You glance in. No trigger, nothing. The face seems inert.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I peek my head in. Does the flickering light in the distance seem brighter?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's too many choices. Too many dice. Fucking shit, motherfuck! Wait, wait, it's a mountain.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is a mountain. You get to have an advantage. That's what rangers do, man!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Was the light seen by the arrow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The light was seen by the arrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So you're looking at the face.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm looking in the fucking tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The face is on the side of it. It's beyond.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it keeps going?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. So depending on how high her perception is, she may, now that she sees the flicker at the end, she may be able to see something. So how high did you roll?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. So you go ahead and you meet up with Keyleth. The rest of you are back by the doorway. Scanlan, you're taking a minute to cast this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You stay halfway between, okay. It's roughly about 150, 200 feet this direction. It's a shallower cavern to this area than the one you came through. It's a longer way in, but you manage to find the other end of this cave-in. It's rocks that have tumbled in and clustered. Keyleth, you glance over and you see shapes moving in the light, and as you glance up ahead, about 30 feet ahead of you, you see six figures heading your direction. Humanoid.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's 100,000 dollars, yo. Six figures, moving your direction!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit, a brand new Tesla is coming this way! Okay. Hey, we have people. We have people coming this way, about six of them. Just letting you know, probably going to be some fighting coming up, and that is your update from the Voice of the Tempest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm creeping back.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. Glyph of Warding is one hour casting time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not that hot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no. Something bad. Hey, Pike? Fire. Fire is very white. White fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Huh.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Feel like coming to the campsite? Maybe?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's start backing up.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Back up a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are we close to the faces at all, still?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're maybe about 70 to 100 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: On the way back?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're backing up through a different tunnel, so there's no faces that you've seen on this side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's leave it at the shift, so if they go up our tunnel, we'll know.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Great. I throw up a Glyph of Warding right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Glyph of Warding. What's the casting time on the glyph?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: A gift for someone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's the casting time on the glyph?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A gif of cording.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, that one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We can't find the card.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Give me just one second. I don't know if it slipped underneath.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Probably a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Everything fun takes a minute.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. So the meal is filling to varying degrees of enjoyment, but you find rest at your disposal. Relatively early into your day, though it is night in Ank'harel. You guys have been awake for approximately five hours. Do you go to rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Tell her you didn't have any.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's true. I have an idea. Bring me a cow. No, I'm kidding.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The spectral servant's like--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It worked once before.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Listen. They make a great cucumber salad. They've got an excellent endive.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fabulous.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A couscous. And a tabbouleh.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So, basically, it's one of those meals that you're still hungry when you eat it all.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's really not filling at all. It's terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And he's not lying.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do we lose hit points from this meal?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit, did we say that we have to buy chalices before we have any more fucking feasts?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shit balls.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Said Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're out of chalices!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do we have any chalices in here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: For what?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're referring to the Heroes' Feast meal, but no. Stuff like that, you stock up on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We've got to remember. We've got to do it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. As you guys go make a blanket fort, curl up and sleep takes you. The next morning, you come to consciousness, are greeted with a fantastic, spiritually brought, vegan breakfast.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: He should!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! We've got to make him remember.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We've got to make him remember.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We've got to make him remember how great we are and what he's lost.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. So tomorrow, all the tricks out the bag, throw caution to the wind, you and me, it's a show.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All the tricks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: I suddenly wake up. You guys, I'm used to sleeping alone. You guys are talking so much.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, sorry, we didn't realize you were awake.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just roll over. If you pile the sand up, you make little earmuffs.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: It's not working, I'm used to silence, and you guys are like two alarms.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're going to go. We go make a blanket fort.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We make a blanket fort by the fireplace.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Thank you!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So Pike, Grog, Lionel, you're right there, there's one skeleton left that's like (breathy hiss). And it leaps at you, since you just crushed its friend. And it hits you on your breastplate and just goes (metal ringing out sound) (breathy hiss). That's all it does. It's a sad sight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All four.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All four again.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Six. That one's cocked, reroll it. Six. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm leaving. I'm going away.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: And I'm like  Grog, look at this, this is awesome! I think I'm channeling you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (strained voice) Yep. Real impressive.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You just, one skeleton, the other comes jumping at you and you just grab it in your hand and crush its skull in your hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (strained voice) That was real cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: And then I go  Look, I'm a gymnast! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: With all the chalk and everything.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've got to appreciate that, Travis.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (strained voice) It was a good moment. That was really impressive.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy. You want to do anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to sit next to Vex and I think we're just going to stand and let this happen.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: New stealth checks from you guys since you've had combat.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This could go-- (interested noises) Yes. Yes, I think I could do something with this.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go kill some shit, shall we? Come on!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I've even got a codeword for it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Codeword?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: There's a codeword?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You have to speak a word to make it work.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A command word, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I program the word? I've programmed it. Perfect.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I put this on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you put that on. All right. Who is going where? What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, hold on. Would you like this, either of you? It's not my bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Gain a plus two bonus to attack... It's a weapon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so what's the plan, guys? What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We should go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should go attack things.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Campfire!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, let's go quietly, you and I, take point.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And head deeper in, see where the people have been.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Twins are in the lead.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You see it is a giant Prismatic Sphere around. The color you see now as it flickers for a minute becomes stark red, just deep ruby red.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's a giant--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. The good news is, you didn't take any of that damage as you bamf inside the sphere. Bad news is, you're blinded for a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean, passing through?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Physically passing through the sphere, so I will say, looking at the rules now and really thinking about how it's worded. It doesn't say otherwise. I'll say you can teleport into the sphere.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god. You're going to another plane!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's not a gimme.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take that damage back.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can take it, Matt. Bring it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. You've made a valid point, and the spell does specify "pass through it." You do not pass through it. You appear on the other side. So what's the range on that?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 500 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You appear inside. You appear within, and you're now on the inside. You can see, the bright colors are there, blinding you from the interior. Make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Congratulations. You're in a prison cell with Charles Manson.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I still have my inspiration.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Currently, there's the one right there who's being held by the brambles. The brambles have vanished, and he's currently still conscious, and it's not his turn yet. So, Percy took all the shots into the orb. It is now Scanlan's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's what I'm saying, you're taking half damage from this. You take seven, as opposed to 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I still there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're still there, right next to the orb.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I am going to unload a couple shots into the orb and see what happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go ahead and take a shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Animus freezes up, I throw it. Pull Bad News. Bad News freezes up. I pull Retort. That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Technically, fire, discard, quick draw, right? Quick draw means you can do it as a free action as a part of it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'll burn an action surge for this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll say because you only used your bonus action to-- oh, not to reload. As a quick draw, you can pull it as an attack, you're fine. So, you do three attacks, the third one fires. You fire (bullet) and it vanishes into the orb.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to sit and fix my guns.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are there any enemies left on the map?
